titleStmt.title: SII 23.257: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 257. (A.R. No. 257 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—on the same wall Kōnērinmaikoṇḍān

summary.p: This records the royal order issued in the 6th year and 280th day of the king (probably Uttama-Chōḷa) under the title given above, from his palace at Paḻaiyāṟu, to the Nāṭṭār, the brahmadēya Elders and the other concerned assemblies (Ūrār and Nagaraṅgaḷilār), making over 15 vēli of land at Nallāḍi village in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu as tax-free dēvadāna to the temple for the celebration, every month, of a special festival on the day of Viśākhā which was the king's natal star. The permanent tenancy over the land was conferred on Araiyaṉ Pirāntakan alias Śembiyaṉ Śōḻiyadaraiyaṉ of Śiṟukuḷattūr on the stipulation that he and his heirs were to measure out every year in the temple the produce of 5 vēli of this land at 120 kalam of paddy per vēli with all the taxes exempted.

The inscription which stops with line 29 is continued elsewhere, and the direction is given in the following lines as to where to look for the continuation viz. on the southern side of the ardha-maṇḍapa, the tiers near the Dakshiṇāmūrti image and other specified places.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koṉoṉiṉmaikoṇṭāṉ tirunaṟaiyūrnāṭṭu nāṭ ṭārkkum brahmadeyakkiḻavarkkum tevatāṉa paḷḷiccantak kaṇimuṟ ṟūṭṭu veṭṭapeṟūrkaḷilārkkum nakaraṅkaḷilārkkum yāṇṭu 9Āvatu nāḷ 2 100 8 10- ṉāl paḻaiyāṟṟu nammiṭṭiluḷḷāl Ācci koyiliṉ muṉpilkūṭattu nām Uṇṭirukka ciṟukuḷattūruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ pirāntakaṉāṉa cempiyaṉ co
ḻiyavaraiyaṉ Iṉakku jivitamiṭṭa tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭu nallāṭi jivitam tavirntu Ivvūr muṉ kāṇiuṭaiyārai māṟṟi Iṉakku janmakkāṇi yāka tantu muṉ veḷḷāṉvakaiyil mutalāy varukiṉṟapaṭi tavirntu tiruviṭaimarutil mahādevarkku tevatāṉa Iṟaiyilik kuṭuttu nallāṭi muṉmutalāy varukiṉṟa nilaṉ patiṉaiyveliyum mikitik kuṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka vaḷai
yiṟ cuṟṟumuṟṟum muṉṟoṉṟāka maṭakki Ayveli nilamum mutalākki Ini laṉ Ayveliyālum veli nūṟṟirupatiṉ kalavaricaiyāl vanta nellu Aṟunūṟṟukkalamum tiruviṭaimarutil mahādevarkke Iṟuttuṇpatāka Iṉakkum Eṉ varggattārkkum kuṭinikkā tevatāṉamāy Inilattāl kācciyum velikkācum veḷikkala viruttariciyum Ūrkaḻañcum
Uḷḷiṭṭa Antarāyakkuṭimaikaḷ tevatāṉaṅ kāṇi terikkum Iṭattu Itu
teriyātitākavum yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu picāṉ mutalvariyiliṭṭut tara
veṇṭum Eṉṟu namakkuc colla tirunaṟaiyūrnāṭṭu nallāṭi jivita
m tavirntu Ivvūr muṉ kāṇi Uṭaiyārai māṟṟi veḷḷā
ṉvakaiyil mutalāy varukiṉṟapaṭi tavirntu tiruviṭaimarutilmahā
tevarkku nam piṟantanāḷ vicākamtoṟum tiṅkaḷ tiruviḻā
c ceyyaveṇṭum nivan[10]ttukku tevatāṉa Iṟai—
yiliyāka koṭuttu Innilaṉ patiṉaiyve
liyum mikitikkuṟai
maium kārāṇmai
miyācciyum Uḷḷaṭa
ṅka variyilum O
ḻiviṉṟi vaḷaiyi
l cuṟṟu muṟṟum
muṉṉoṉṟāka
maṭakki vanta nilaṉ
Ayveliyālum veli
nūṟṟirupatu kalavaricai
yāl nel Aṟunūṟṟukka
lamum tiruviṭaimarutil
mahādevarkke Iṟaiaṭṭi
Uṇpatāka
ciṟukuḷattūruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ parāntakaṉāṉa cempiyaṉ co
ḻiyavaraiyaṉukkum Ivaṉ varggattārkkum kuṭinikkā tevatāṉa
m Iṟaiiliyāka koṭuttu Inilattāl kācciyum ve
likkācum (iñcunilam potātāka kiḻe Iḻiñcom)

cempiya
ṉcoḻiyavarai
yarkku nallāṭi sā
danam veṭṭiyapaṭi . koyi
liṉ Attamaṇṭapattu te
ṟkil Uttarattilum Itiṉ
ṟkiḻaiy pontu da
kṣiṇāmurttikaḷ kiḻaikku
ṭattilum vetikaiyiṉ
kiḻaikaṇṭattilum paṭṭi
kaiyiṉ kiḻaikkaṇṭattilu
mitakattiṉ melaippaṭṭa
nila jālekattiṉ�—
malaikkuṭṭattilum maṇṭapa
ttil vetikaiyil kaṇṭat
tilum paṭṭikaiyiṉ kiḻai

kkaṇṭattilum
ṭṭi Itiṉ kuṟai
vaṭapāṭu
veṭṭiṉa Iṭam nir
māliyanirpotu
mcilaiyilve
tikaiyiṉ kiḻai
kkaṇṭatlum paṭṭi
kaiyiṉ kiḻaikka
ṇṭattilum meṟkku
nokki cuḻalveṭi
Digital edition of SII 23.257 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
